description: Animated underwater caustic light patterns formed by dual-layer Worley noise driven through a time-varying domain warp. The characteristic shimmering network of bright threads on a dark ocean floor.

modifiers.comment: Secondary caustic layer at higher frequency — adds depth
Brighten mid-tones to match caustic light intensity distribution

example_prompts: create animated underwater caustic light patterns with shimmering threads
make deep ocean caustics with time-varying Worley domain warp

screenshot_metadata.notes: Render at 1024x1024. Map caustic intensity to luminance in a deep ocean palette: dark navy (#060d1f) shadows to bright cyan-white (#a8f0ff) highlights. Animated at 24+ fps, time uniform in seconds.
